South Korean tech giant Samsung has announced that it has started rolling out One UI 8.5 to older devices. Well, devices two generations older than the current Galaxy S26 line, anyway. The specific list includes the Galaxy S25 and S24 series, including their FE variants, the Galaxy Z Fold7 and Flip7, Fold6 and Flip6, as […]

items.title: Intel Razor Lake-AX Rumoured To Reintroduce On-Package Memory
items.summary:
Rumours have it that Intel could be planning to bring back its on-package memory architecture, with the future Razor Lake-AX being the potential candidate for its return. items.title: Govee’s Matter Pendant Light brings unique and stylish three-layer illumination at $120 (second-best price), more
items.summary:
Through its official Amazon storefront, Govee is offering the popular Matter Pendant Light down at $119.98 shipped, beating out its direct website pricing by $10. Down from a $150 full price tag, discounts in 2026 have been bouncing around from $130 all the way to its $110 low. The deal here gives you the second-lowest price we have tracked, saving you $30 and landing it just $10 above the low that we last saw during March’s Big Spring Sale event. You can learn more about what it brings to your kitchen island, dining room, or other spaces below, or browse all the brand’s current smart lighting device deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Segway’s Find My-equipped, 44-mile traveling F3 e-scooter gets a $30 accessory bundle credit while down at $750
items.summary:
As part of Segway’s current lineup of e-scooter and e-bike discounts, the brand is offering a special $29.99 discount on bundle accessories with the F3 Electric Scooter at $749.99 shipped, which matches the price at Amazon, but does not come with the same bundle promotion there. The e-scooter on its own is down from a $850 going rate, despite carrying a $1,000 MSRP. While we have seen the price drop lower in the past, you’re still getting a solid $100 markdown off the going rate here, with $29.99 additional savings on accessories bundled on the scooter’s landing page. Head below to learn more about it, or check out our original coverage of the full lineup of Segway EV deals that start from $296 here.

items.title: Upgrade spigots with meross’ two-zone Wi-Fi smart water timer that is down at a new $90 low (Reg. $116)
items.summary:
Through its official Amazon storefront, meross is offering its newest Two-Zone Wi-Fi Water Timer for $89.99 shipped. It’s dropped down from a $116 full price, which we’ve previously only seen discounted to $94 and $92 since it hit the market nearly three months ago. Now, while this deal lasts, you’re getting a 22% markdown off the going rate for $26 savings at a new all-time low price. You can also find several more meross smart devices at discounted rates in the official Amazon storefront here.

So far in 2026, we’ve only seen discounts from its $300 full price to $270 that has repeated a few times since February, but now, you’re able to score a little more savings as summer is set to arrive. While we have seen the price go a bit lower in the past, you’re looking at a solid $45 markdown here to the best price we have tracked since mid-December. Head below to learn about what it can bring to your BBQ season.
